description: Canonical evidence classification registry for the construction-kernel family. Defines evidence types, quality tiers, and linkage posture shared across all repos.

evidence_types.name: Field Observation
evidence_types.description: Direct observation recorded during site visit or field inspection.

evidence_types.name: Laboratory Test
evidence_types.description: Result from a controlled laboratory test per a recognized test method.

evidence_types.name: Forensic Analysis Report
evidence_types.description: Post-failure analysis documenting root cause determination.

evidence_types.name: Manufacturer Published Data
evidence_types.description: Data published by the product manufacturer (TDS, SDS, installation guides).

evidence_types.name: Published Literature
evidence_types.description: Peer-reviewed or industry-published research, case studies, or technical papers.

evidence_types.name: Expert Judgment
evidence_types.description: Professional opinion from a qualified subject matter expert.

evidence_types.name: Sensor/Monitoring Data
evidence_types.description: Data from embedded sensors, moisture monitors, or building monitoring systems.

evidence_types.name: Inspection Report
evidence_types.description: Formal inspection report from a qualified inspector or testing agency.

evidence_types.name: Commissioning Report
evidence_types.description: Building enclosure commissioning report documenting functional performance verification.

evidence_types.name: Warranty Claim Record
evidence_types.description: Documentation from a warranty claim or dispute.

quality_tiers.primary: Direct measurement, observation, or test result from a qualified source.
quality_tiers.secondary: Published data or manufacturer documentation — authoritative but not project-specific.
quality_tiers.tertiary: Professional opinion or anecdotal — useful but requires corroboration.

linkage_posture: Evidence records must reference the kernel truth entry they support. Evidence does not replace kernel truth — it validates, qualifies, or challenges it.
